summary: Tested policy unassign/withdraw, org settings, and compliance scoring features. Fixed critical frontend bug (isAdmin not defined). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI verified with Playwright.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/org-settings - returns organisation settings with service_type
✅ Backend: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/unassign - unassigns pending policy with audit log
✅ Backend: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/withdraw - withdraws acknowledged policy with history preserved
✅ Backend: Cannot unassign acknowledged policy (returns 400 with helpful message)
✅ Backend: Cannot withdraw pending policy (returns 400 with helpful message)
✅ Backend: Audit logs include policy_unassigned and policy_withdrawn actions
✅ Backend: Policy counts exclude unassigned/withdrawn from active list
✅ Frontend: Compliance score in top card (52%) matches What's Needed percentage (52%)
✅ Frontend: Unassign button visible for pending policies only
✅ Frontend: Withdraw button visible for acknowledged policies only
✅ Frontend: Unassign action works - policy removed from active list, toast shown
✅ Frontend: Policy counts update correctly after unassign (2 of 3 → 2 of 2)

fixed_issues.fix: Added isAdmin to useAuth() destructuring: const { token, isAuditor, isAdmin, user } = useAuth();

critical_code_review_comments: Policy unassign/withdraw workflow is audit-safe with proper timestamps and identity tracking
Org settings endpoint correctly handles service_type for adults_only/children_only/mixed
Frontend correctly shows Unassign for pending and Withdraw for acknowledged policies
seed_data_creation: Created 'Data Protection Policy' and assigned to test employee Olakunle Alonge for testing Unassign functionality. Policy was then unassigned during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Policy Unassign/Withdraw and Org Settings features fully tested. Key endpoints: PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/unassign (for pending), PUT /api/policy-assignments/{id}/withdraw (for acknowledged), GET/PUT /api/org-settings. Frontend Policies tab shows Unassign button for pending policies and Withdraw button for acknowledged policies. Compliance score is now consistent between top card and What's Needed tab. Test employee Olakunle Alonge has 2 acknowledged policies (Test Policy x2). Fixed isAdmin not defined error in EmployeeProfilePage.js.

compliance_scoring.consistency: Top card and What's Needed tab show same percentage
